positive: A symmetrical, highly detailed botanical and celestial mandala design. The composition features intertwining elements: stylized crescent moons, constellations, and exotic floral motifs (e.g., ginger, jasmine). The artwork must be rendered in intricate, elegant single-line continuous line art style, mixed with clean geometric vector graphic accents. The composition should be centered and suitable for a repeating seamless pattern or a single bold print placement. Utilize a high contrast black and white palette with occasional soft gold metallic accents. Focus on strong, clean silhouettes and crisp edges. The overall aesthetic should be luxurious, mystical, and timeless, like an engraving mixed with modern tattoo flash art. Flat graphic design, zero shading gradients, perfectly crisp vector lines.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, copyright, amateur, dirty, noisy, low quality, bad anatomy, excessive shading, photorealism, logo, trademark, lettering, speech bubble
